message:
fix(buffer): drop inner service guard before transitioning to Error state

In BufferFutureState, when the inner service returns Poll::Ready(Err(e)),
the MutexGuard on the inner service was held while the state machine
transitioned to BufferFutureState::Error. This meant the lock was not
released until the next loop iteration polled the Error state. Adding an
explicit drop(inner) before the state transition ensures the inner
service mutex is released immediately, preventing potential deadlocks if
the error-handling path attempts to re-acquire the same lock or if
another task is waiting on the inner service.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
